image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about rainbows than social media does.
Context visual: When light hits water droplets, magic happens. But it’s all about physics.
Escalation visual: Every color bends at a different angle. That’s why you see the spectrum.
Evidence visual: Red shines at 42 degrees, violet at 40.3. That’s how you get a rainbow arc.
Payoff visual: Rainbows are nature’s art, but they follow strict rules of light and water.
Cta visual: Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow for more!
